nodes.name: 8am Mon–Sat
nodes.notes: Fires at 08:00 Monday–Saturday. Sends the clinic owner a digest of the previous evening's calls.

nodes.name: Fetch last 50 calls (Retell)
nodes.notes:
Fetches recent calls from the Retell API.

Required env vars:
  RETELL_API_KEY  — Retell API key (key_xxxxxxxxx)
  RETELL_AGENT_ID — your Ava agent ID from the Retell dashboard

nodes.name: Email digest to owner
nodes.notes:
Sends the overnight digest to the clinic owner.

Required env vars:
  OWNER_EMAIL — clinic owner's email address (e.g. jamal@spiresphysiotherapy.com)

Configure with Resend SMTP credentials in n8n.

nodes.name: Slack alert if actions needed
nodes.notes:
Optional: Slack nudge if there are voicemails or missed calls to action.
Set SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL in n8n env vars.

meta.description:
Fires at 08:00 Mon–Sat and emails the clinic owner a digest of the previous evening's calls.

Includes:
  - Total overnight calls
  - Voicemails with transcripts (need callback)
  - Missed/disconnected calls
  - Bookings taken
  - Action count summary
  - Optional Slack nudge if actions > 0

Required env vars:
  RETELL_API_KEY  — Retell API key
  RETELL_AGENT_ID — Ava's agent ID in the Retell dashboard
  OWNER_EMAIL     — clinic owner's email address
  SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL — optional
